subcodes.first_line: God hath verily cast trials and tribulations upon those who have disbelieved, that there might be made manifest that which He revealed in the Súrih of Ra'ís [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد اوقع الله الفتن و البلایا بین الذین کفروا لیظهر ما انزله فی سوره الرئیس
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @rejection, opposition and persecution
